message: Add Proxygen submodule and Xcode integration

files.patch:
@@ -35,3 +35,8 @@
 	path = libtenzir/aux/folly
 	url = https://github.com/facebook/folly
 	shallow = true
+
+[submodule "libtenzir/aux/proxygen"]
+	path = libtenzir/aux/proxygen
+	url = https://github.com/facebook/proxygen.git
+	shallow = true

@@ -825,7 +825,11 @@ endif ()
 # -- folly ---------------------------------------------------------------------
 
 option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY "Use the folly submodule" ON)
+set(TENZIR_FOLLY_MINIMUM_VERSION "2026.01.19.00")
 if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
+  # Keep glog headers consuming correctly when pulled in through Folly's async APIs.
+  add_definitions(-DGLOG_USE_GLOG_EXPORT)
+
   # folly's CMake config references gflags_shared in INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES.
   # We need to find gflags first and fix its target configuration, because
   # Homebrew gflags only exports IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE.
@@ -841,6 +845,26 @@ if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
     endif ()
   endif ()
   find_package(folly REQUIRED)
+  if (DEFINED folly_VERSION)
+    set(_tenzir_folly_version "${folly_VERSION}")
+  elseif (DEFINED FOLLY_VERSION)
+    set(_tenzir_folly_version "${FOLLY_VERSION}")
+  else ()
+    set(_tenzir_folly_version "")
+  endif ()
+  if (_tenzir_folly_version)
+    string(REGEX REPLACE "-.*$" "" _tenzir_folly_version "${_tenzir_folly_version}")
+    if (_tenzir_folly_version VERSION_LESS "${TENZIR_FOLLY_MINIMUM_VERSION}")
+      message(
+        FATAL_ERROR
+          "Found Folly ${_tenzir_folly_version} but Tenzir requires Folly >="
+          " ${TENZIR_FOLLY_MINIMUM_VERSION}.")
+    endif ()
+  else ()
+    message(
+      WARNING
+      "Found Folly without a version string; skipping minimum version verification.")
+  endif ()
   find_package(glog REQUIRED)
   dependency_summary("folly" Folly::folly "Dependencies")
 else ()
@@ -944,6 +968,54 @@ else ()
                      "Dependencies")
 endif ()
 
+# -- proxygen ------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+option(TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN "Build the Proxygen submodule and integrate it" OFF)
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN)
+  if (NOT EXISTS
+      "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen/CMakeLists.txt")
+    message(
+      FATAL_ERROR
+        "proxygen not found, either use -DTENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN=OFF or"
+        " initialize the libtenzir/aux/proxygen submodule")
+  endif ()
+  # Keep Proxygen from pulling bundled dependencies so it can stay versioned and
+  # dependency-matched with the separate Folly submodule.
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FOLLY OFF CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_WANGLE OFF CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FIZZ OFF CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_MVFST OFF CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZLIB OFF CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZSTD OFF CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+  set(_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
+  set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES ON)
+  add_subdirectory(libtenzir/aux/proxygen SYSTEM)
+  set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
+  set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "")
+  foreach (_tenzir_candidate IN ITEMS
+                                  "proxygen"
+                                  "Proxygen::proxygen"
+                                  "proxygenhttpserver"
+                                  "Proxygen::proxygenhttpserver")
+    if (TARGET ${_tenzir_candidate})
+      set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "${_tenzir_candidate}")
+      break()
+    endif ()
+  endforeach ()
+  if (NOT _tenzir_proxygen_target)
+    message(
+      FATAL_ERROR
+        "Could not determine the Proxygen CMake target name; extend"
+        " the candidate list in CMakeLists.txt.")
+  endif ()
+  message(STATUS "Using Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
+  set(_tenzir_bundled_proxygen "${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
+  dependency_summary("proxygen"
+                     "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen"
+                     "Dependencies")
+endif ()
+
 if (TENZIR_ENABLE_RELOCATABLE_INSTALLATIONS
     AND BUILD_SHARED_LIBS
     AND CAF_LIBRARY_CORE)

@@ -490,9 +490,39 @@ dependency_summary("re2" re2::re2 "Dependencies")
 
 # Link against folly.
 target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC Folly::folly)
+if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
+  # Ensure Folly's own headers are preferred over system includes to avoid
+  # ABI/constructor mismatches from mixed folly installations.
+  get_target_property(_tenzir_folly_include_dirs Folly::folly
+                      INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
+  if (_tenzir_folly_include_dirs)
+    target_include_directories(libtenzir BEFORE PRIVATE ${_tenzir_folly_include_dirs})
+  endif ()
+endif ()
 if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
   string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(folly REQUIRED)")
 endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN)
+  if (DEFINED _tenzir_bundled_proxygen AND TARGET ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen})
+    get_target_property(_tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs
+                        ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}
+                        INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
+    if (_tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs)
+      target_include_directories(libtenzir PRIVATE ${_tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs})
+    endif ()
+    target_link_libraries(
+      libtenzir
+      PRIVATE
+        $<$<BOOL:${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}>:$<TARGET_FILE:${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}>>)
+    if (DEFINED _tenzir_bundled_proxygen)
+      message(VERBOSE "Linking Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}")
+    endif ()
+  else ()
+    message(
+      WARNING
+      "TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN is set but no known Proxygen target was detected.")
+  endif ()
+endif ()
 # gflags is a transitive dependency of glog (used by folly). We must re-export
 # find_package(gflags) so that plugins can resolve the gflags_shared cmake
 # target that appears in the exported transitive link libraries.
